narrative:
Lima 6A (precinct in Allen County) has 769 registered voters, with 69.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 12.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.9%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.7 percentage points.
